creator: colin-ports@heliocat.net
text:
Created attachment 176288
Port update

Diff contains the following changes:
Makefile: Version bump, maintainer email adjustment
distinfo: contents update
pkg-plist: file drift

Notable changes between 2.3.9.0 and 2.4.0.0:
    More support for advanced fd callbacks in unixmessage_sender and unixconnection.
    ipc_timed_send(), ipc_timed_recv()
    rt.lib sysdep removed; spawn.lib and timer.lib sysdeps added
    Leap second for 2016-12-31 23:59:60 UTC added
    Complete librandom rewrite
    skalibs/alarm.h added
    Support for advanced fd callbacks in unixmessage_sender. 

As always, update notes can be found at:
http://www.skarnet.org/software/skalibs/upgrade.html
